title: Hot weather forecast with danger warnings
description: GARDEN ROUTE | KAROO NEWS - Extremely high...
bodyText:
GARDEN ROUTE | KAROO NEWS - Extremely high fire danger conditions are expected over the West Coast District and the western parts of the Garden Route District today, Sunday 27 April.

On Monday, high fire conditions are expected over the Laingsburg, Kannaland, Oudtshoorn, Breede-River Valley and the Cederberg municipalities.


> The hot temperatures along with dry conditions and strong winds can result in the development of runaway and veld/bush fires.


Expected temperatures on Sunday 27 April:


> Weather forecast for Monday, 28 April


Partly cloudy and cool to warm but hot in places in the west, with isolated showers and thundershowers in the extreme east.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
